name: Rand Paul
subject: Doing it again TONIGHT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot
Last week, the Washington Machine conspired
to keep me off the main debate stage, even though our poll
numbers qualified me.
In fact, my rising numbers ranked above three
people on the stage that night in multiple polls
But instead of letting them define us or box
us in, I took our message around them.
With two full days of national media, then an
online and social media blitz that culminated with an online
national town hall, we won the week.
My message reached over 15 million people on
TV and radio, and over 25 million online, while the undercard
debate had only about 2 million viewers.
We were so successful taking our message to
people online that we are doing it again TONIGHT!
This evening, I will be live tweeting the
Democrat debate, starting around 9PM EST for as long as I can
stand it.
I can't promise we will be doing it for two
hours. Who can take that punishment for two hours?
But we will be on for the first hour or more,
with remarks, content and responses. Content will again go
across our social media platforms.
So please join us online tonight at 9 PM EST.
The Democrats won't be saying much that is
interesting, and I'll talk about that.
And if they somehow say something worthwhile
-- well, I'll talk about that too, so you won't miss a thing!
Please join me tonight at 9 PM!
In liberty,
Rand Paul

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: Campaign Update/100 Days Out!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
**TO:** Key Campaign Supporters
**FROM:** Sheila O'Connell, Van Hollen for Senate Campaign Manager
**TOPIC:** 100 Days Out! This Sunday marks 100 days until the April 26th primary - and we are gearing up here at HQ and at our offices across the state to move full steam ahead. That means more canvassing, phone banking, organizing meetings and outreach events to get the word out about our incredible candidate.

For his part, Chris has continued to crisscross the state, meeting people and getting strong positive feedback that Marylanders are focused on electing a proven progressive leader who knows how to get things done!

While **[the Baltimore Sun poll](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c12/70cdc2ba/47b98c0e/396403f/109766577/VEsH/ "http://www.baltimoresun.com/news/maryland/politics/2016-senate-race/bs-md-sun-poll-senate-20151122-story.html?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+the+Baltimore+Sun+poll&utm_campaign=em11716&source=em11716")** showed Chris ahead "in virtually every corner of the state", we are taking nothing for granted here at Team Van Hollen. We know that many voters across the state still don't know about Chris and we are working hard to close that gap before Election Day.

Many things have happened since our last update. Here are just a few highlights:
* **SEIU Endorsement** \- Representing more than 40,000 members across the state -- including hospital workers, teachers and security guards - all local chapters of Maryland's**[SEIU announced](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c12/70cdc2ba/47b98c0e/396403c/109766577/VEsE/ "https://www.washingtonpost.com/local/md-politics/union-that-helped-make-edwards-switches-alliance-to-van-hollen/2015/12/02/1ab2b23a-986c-11e5-b499-76cbec161973_story.html?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+SEIU+announced&utm_campaign=em11716&source=em11716")** they will be working to elect Chris because he is the candidate that will best represent Maryland workers in the U.S. Senate. In a fight to advance Maryland's progressive values, you want the SEIU on your side.

* **More Baltimore area leaders have endorsed Chris** - Earlier this month every Democrat on the **[Baltimore County Council](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c12/70cdc2ba/47b98c0e/396403d/109766577/VEsF/ "http://www.baltimoresun.com/news/maryland/politics/blog/bs-md-co-vanhollen-endorse-20160104-story.html?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Baltimore+County+Council&utm_campaign=em11716&source=em11716")** endorsed Chris to be our next Senator, citing among other things his leadership on education issues and bringing jobs to our state. In Baltimore City, Chris also continued to receive **[important endorsements](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c12/70cdc2ba/47b98c0e/396403a/109766577/VEsC/ "http://www.baltimoresun.com/news/maryland/politics/blog/bal-young-mcfadden-back-van-hollen-and-doubt-cummings-will-run-20151207-story.html?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+important+endorsements&utm_campaign=em11716&source=em11716")** , including City Council President Jack Young, State Senator McFadden and many other key leaders.

* **Sierra Club Endorsement** - Last week, the Sierra Club's national President, Maryland Executive Committee Chair, and supporters joined Chris on the banks of the Anacostia River **[to announce their support](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c12/70cdc2ba/47b98c0e/396403b/109766577/VEsD/ "https://www.washingtonpost.com/local/md-politics/sierra-club-endorses-van-hollen-in-marylands-senate-race/2016/01/11/8f6f8b80-b887-11e5-99f3-184bc379b12d_story.html?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+to+announce+their+support&utm_campaign=em11716&source=em11716")** and praise his leadership on environmental issues.

* **Firefighters (IAFF) Endorsement** \- Chris was endorsed by**[local leaders and firefighters](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c12/70cdc2ba/47b98c0e/3964038/109766577/VEsA/ "http://www.heraldmailmedia.com/news/annapolis/political_notebook/political-notebook-for-dec/article_c13960ac-aceb-11e5-93ec-db2f4bb9b686.html?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+local+leaders+and+firefighters&utm_campaign=em11716&source=em11716")** in Washington County and discussed the need for a strong economy in Western Maryland and across the state.

* **CASA de Maryland Endorsement** - a leading immigrant advocacy group, **[CASA endorsed](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c12/70cdc2ba/47b98c0e/3964039/109766577/VEsB/ "https://www.washingtonpost.com/local/md-politics/major-pro-immigrant-organization-backs-van-hollen-in-senate-race/2015/12/01/478c9ed4-9834-11e5-8917-653b65c809eb_story.html?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+CASA+endorsed&utm_campaign=em11716&source=em11716")** Chris citing their confidence that "Chris Van Hollen is ready to challenge the status quo to advance justice."

All of these diverse groups are standing with Chris because they want a U.S. Senator who will listen, lead and do what it takes to get the job done. People are tired of dead-end politics. They want someone who won't just talk, but is able to take action to solve problems. And in this challenging global environment, more and more people are noticing that Chris will also bring deep knowledge about national security issues to the Senate.

The support of each of you is the backbone of this campaign and Chris is so thankful for it. Working together we will elect a U.S. Senator that we can all be proud of and one that we know will have a strong and positive impact for each of us, our state and our country.

Thank you for all you do,

\-- Sheila

P.S. -- You can help keep the momentum going. name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: The most important debate of the campaign
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
When we launched our campaign and called for a political revolution in this country, the corporate media laughed us off. They said our "radical" ideas would never attract much support.
Months later, we have the largest grassroots base of support of any campaign, and are now on the verge of overtaking the "inevitable" frontrunner in Iowa.
I think the reason our campaign is doing so well is because Bernie is telling the truth. He's telling the truth about the best way to provide health care for the 29 million of our neighbors who are still without, and about a rigged economy held in place by corrupt politics where Wall Street banks and billionaires buy elections.
**In just a few hours, Bernie will take the stage for the final debate before the Iowa caucuses, where we trail by just three points. This is a big night for our campaign, and Bernie is ready.**
